channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bitcoin climbs to $77,500 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $77,541 on Wednesday morning, up 2.2% over 24 hours and 4.3% on the week, after Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and Strategy disclosed its largest BTC purchase in 17 months....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.description: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk
